sentences.target: Ce couple arrive toujours avant nous.

translations.fr: Ce couple arrive toujours avant nous.
translations.en: That couple always arrives before us.
translations.es: Esa pareja siempre llega antes que nosotros.
translations.de: Dieses Paar kommt immer vor uns an.
translations.it: Quella coppia arriva sempre prima di noi.
translations.ko: 그 커플은 항상 우리보다 먼저 도착해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那对情侣总是比我们先到。
translations.yue: 嗰對情侶成日都比我哋早到。
translations.ru: Та пара всегда приходит раньше нас.
translations.pt: Esse casal sempre chega antes de nós.
translations.tr: O çift her zaman bizden önce gelir.
translations.vi: Cặp đôi đó luôn đến trước chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Dat stel komt altijd eerder dan wij.
translations.uk: Та пара завжди приходить раніше за нас.
translations.hu: Az a pár mindig előttünk érkezik.
translations.hi: वह जोड़ा हमेशा हमसे पहले पहुँचता है.
translations.pl: Ta para zawsze przychodzi wcześniej niż my.
translations.el: Αυτό το ζευγάρι φτάνει πάντα πριν από εμάς.
translations.nb: Det paret kommer alltid før oss.
translations.id: Pasangan itu selalu datang sebelum kami.
translations.sv: Det där paret kommer alltid före oss.
translations.ro: Cuplul acela ajunge întotdeauna înaintea noastră.
translations.cs: Ten pár vždy dorazí před námi.
translations.da: Det par kommer altid før os.
translations.fi: Se pari saapuu aina ennen meitä.
translations.ja: あのカップルはいつも私たちより先に来ます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'couple' to specify a particular referent.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the verb 'arrive'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with 'Ce couple'.
Adverb of frequency modifying 'arrive'.
Preposition introducing 'nous'; marks temporal precedence ('before us').
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, stressed form; object of the preposition 'avant'.

sentences.target: On a croisé un couple au marché.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a kʁwaze œ̃ kupl o maʁʃe/

translations.fr: On a croisé un couple au marché.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a kʁwaze œ̃ kupl o maʁʃe/
translations.en: We ran into a couple at the market.
translations.es: Nos cruzamos con una pareja en el mercado.
translations.de: Wir sind auf dem Markt einem Paar begegnet.
translations.it: Ci siamo imbattuti in una coppia al mercato.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在市场上偶遇了一对情侣。
translations.yue: 我哋喺街市撞到一對情侶。
translations.ru: Мы на рынке случайно встретили пару.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tình cờ gặp một cặp đôi ở chợ.
translations.nl: We kwamen op de markt ein stel tegen.
translations.uk: Ми на ринку випадково зустріли пару.
translations.hu: A piacon véletlenül összefutottunk egy párral.
translations.hi: हम बाज़ार में एक जोड़े से टकरा गए.
translations.pl: Natknęliśmy się na parę na targu.
translations.nb: Vi støtte på et par på markedet.
translations.id: Kami kebetulan bertemu sepasang kekasih di pasar.
translations.sv: Vi sprang på ett par på marknaden.
translations.ro: Ne-am întâlnit cu un cuplu în piață.
translations.cs: Na trhu jsme narazili na pár.
translations.da: Vi stødte på et par på markedet.
translations.ja: 市場でひと組のカップルにばったり会いました。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun often used colloquially for 'we'; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary in present (3rd singular) forming the passé composé with 'croisé'.
Past participle; main verb of the compound tense with 'a' (we ran into/met).
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'couple'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'croisé'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition introducing the location 'marché'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

translations.zh-Hans: 你们是一对可爱的情侣。
translations.yue: 你哋係一對好可愛嘅情侶。
translations.vi: Các bạn là một cặp đôi đáng yêu.
translations.hi: आप लोग एक प्यारा जोड़ा हैं.
translations.ja: あなたたちはとてもかわいいカップルです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person plural or formal singular; subject.
Copular auxiliary, present 2nd plural; links subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'couple'.
Common noun, masculine singular; predicate nominal after the copula.
Attributive adjective modifying 'couple' in the predicate; expresses a positive quality.

sentences.target: Je veux être en couple avec toi.

translations.fr: Je veux être en couple avec toi.
translations.en: I want to be in a relationship with you.
translations.es: Quiero estar en una relación contigo.
translations.de: Ich will mit dir zusammen sein.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn hẹn hò với bạn.
translations.ar: أريد أن أكون في علاقة معك.
translations.nl: Ik wil een relatie met jou.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे साथ रिश्ते में रहना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę być z tobą w związku.
translations.el: Θέλω να είμαι σε σχέση μαζί σου.
translations.nb: Jeg vil være i et forhold med deg.
translations.sv: Jag vill vara i en relation med dig.
translations.ro: Vreau să fiu într-o relație cu tine.
translations.da: Jeg vil være i et forhold med dig.
translations.ja: あなたと付き合いたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject.
Main verb, present 1st singular; takes the infinitive 'être' as complement.
Infinitive verb; complements 'veux' and functions as the copular verb within the expression 'en couple'.
Preposition; part of the fixed expression 'en couple' meaning 'in a relationship'.
Common noun, masculine singular; within the fixed expression 'en couple' serving as predicate complement.
Preposition introducing the complement 'toi' (the partner).
Stressed personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.
